summary: Completed testing of GTM + Partner Management + Onboarding Pack. Backend APIs all working (11/11 tests passed). Frontend pages working with one bug fixed.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Link was pointing to /admin/affiliates/{id} instead of /admin/affiliate-partners/{id}

issues: Form inputs lack labels - only placeholders visible. Consider adding visible labels for better accessibility.

critical_code_review_comments: GoToMarketConfigPage.jsx: Form inputs use only placeholders without visible labels - accessibility concern
VendorDashboardPage.jsx: Uses prompt() for user input which is not ideal UX - consider modal dialogs

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages rendering correctly after fix

seed_data_creation: None - used existing affiliate data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GTM + Partner Management pack fully tested. All backend APIs working. Fixed routing bug in AffiliatePartnerManagerPage.jsx where View Detail link was pointing to wrong route. All frontend pages (GoToMarketConfigPage, AffiliatePartnerManagerPage, AffiliatePartnerDetailPage, VendorDashboardPage, HelpAdminPage with OnboardingWizard) are rendering and functional.

gtm_settings_api.details: GET and PUT /api/admin/go-to-market/settings working correctly. Settings persist after update.

affiliate_manager_api.details: GET /api/admin/affiliates (list with filter), GET /:id (detail), PUT /:id/status, PUT /:id/promo-code all working.

gtm_config_ui.details: Page renders with all form fields (11 number inputs, 2 checkboxes, 3 selects). Save functionality works and persists.

affiliate_partner_manager_ui.details: Page shows affiliate list with 6 affiliates. Status filter dropdown works. View Detail buttons navigate correctly after fix.

affiliate_detail_ui.details: Detail page shows affiliate info, metrics, status action buttons (Activate/Watchlist/Pause/Suspend), Edit Promo Code button, and Masked Sales section.

vendor_dashboard_ui.details: Page renders with performance metrics (Total Jobs, Completed, Completion Rate, Avg Quality). Shows 'No jobs assigned yet' when empty.

help_admin_page.details: Admin Help page renders with OnboardingWizard component showing 3-step admin onboarding and help bullets.

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real implementations with MongoDB persistence
